introduced_concepts.name: Alpha
introduced_concepts.definition: A model parameter or distribution-shape parameter named alpha in the local context.

introduced_concepts.name: Delta
introduced_concepts.definition: A local change or increment in the modeled quantity.

introduced_concepts.name: Probability
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity measuring how likely an event or state transition is.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量某个事件或状态转移发生可能性的数量。

introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 5.27b Count
